arts.ttl: Steffen Baumgart on Union Berlin video and form woes: “We must clench our ass cheeks and carry on!”
arts.sum: FC Union Berlin trainer Steffen Baumgart answered questions about a direct video produced by club president Dirk Zingler at a Friday press conference.

arts.ttl: Koch a doubt for Eintracht's clash with Union Berlin
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt are set to make a late decision on Robin Koch's availability for Sunday's Bundesliga game against Union Berlin.
